fullArticle:
Your daily source for off topic chatter with the MMA Mania faithful.

Hey all, here’s your open thread for Thursday.

Back in the early 2000s I was a film buff and actually wanted to make movies (I got somewhat close with that). Amores Perros was a movie that gave me this feeling. However, it didn’t really live up to a recent rewatch. Others from back then that stunned me were Revanche, Lives of Others and Paradise Lost.

I feel like the Geography quizzes have been popular lately.
